1-d-comparison.png.description: A number line with blue points representing the price of various restaurants. A green point represents the price at In-N-Out, and arrows point to it and the nearest blue point
1-d-comparison.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap team in Desmos

2-d-comparison.png.description: A coordinate plane blue points representing the price vs. french fry quality of various restaurants. A green point represents the price at In-N-Out, and arrows point to it and the nearest blue point
2-d-comparison.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap team in Desmos

2-d-comparison-w-lines.png.description: A coordinate plane with blue points representing the price vs. french fry quality of various restaurants. A green point represents the price at In-N-Out, and arrows point to it and the nearest blue point. Lines are drawn from these two points to the origin, with the angle between the lines measured at 18 degrees.
2-d-comparison-w-lines.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap team in Desmos

3-d-comparison-w-lines.png.description: A 3D coordinate system with orange points representing the price vs. french fry quality vs. burger quality of various restaurants. A green point represents at In-N-Out, and arrows point to it and the nearest orange point. Lines are drawn from these two points to the origin, with the angle between the lines measured at 18 degrees.
3-d-comparison-w-lines.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap team in Desmos

3d-rgb.webp.description: A 3D scatterplot showing images plotted on blue-v-red-green axes, with projections of those points on the blue-v-red and blue-v-green axes
3d-rgb.webp.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

all-mountains.webp.description: A 3x3 grid of mountain images. Some have sunrises and sunset, some have snow, some have grass, and some have water.
all-mountains.webp.source: All images are taken from Wikimedia, and have a Creative Commons License

blue-v-green.png.description: A 2D scatterplot showing images-as-points plotted on blue-v-green axes
blue-v-green.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

blue-v-green-images.png.description: A 2D scatterplot showing images plotted on blue-v-green axes
blue-v-green-images.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

blue-v-red.png.description: A 2D scatterplot showing images-as-points plotted on blue-v-red axes
blue-v-red.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

burger-fry-blank.png.description: An empty 1st quadrant, with the x-axis labeled 'Fries' and the y-axis labeled 'Burgers'
burger-fry-blank.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team in Desmos

projection.webp.description: A 3D rendering of a short cylinder casting shadows on two perpendicular surfaces. One shadow is a circle, and the other is a square.
projection.webp.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

projection-bw.png.description: (Black and White image) A 3D rendering of a short cylinder casting shadows on two perpendicular surfaces. One shadow is a circle, and the other is a square.
projection-bw.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

soln1.png.description: a coordinate plane with rays from the origin through (0,4) and (4,0)

soln2.png.description: a coordinate plane with rays from the origin through (1,1) and (0,4)

soln3.png.description: a coordinate plane with rays from the origin through (1,1) and (1,3)

soln4.png.description: a coordinate plane with overlapping rays from the origin through (2,3) and (2,3)

window.png.description: a screenshot of the portion of the pyret graph where we can adjust the domain and range of the display
window.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap team in Pyret

bag-of-colors.png.description: an cartoon bag, filled with the words 'Red', 'Green', and 'Blue'

computer-vision.jpg.description: an image of a robot, holding up a book with a thumbs-up on the cover
computer-vision.jpg.source: Created by Shashi Bellamkonda on Flickr

luminance-entropy.png.description: various mountain images plotted on a scatter plot with axes for luminance and entropy
luminance-entropy.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team in Pyret

luminance-entropy-green.png.description: various mountain images plotted on a scatter plot with axes for luminance and entropy
luminance-entropy-green.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team in Pyret

image-search.png.description: a screenshot of a mouse pointer, dragging an image into Google Image's search box
